focused_regressions.proves: The helper exports the no-public-solution-search policy values expected by provider subprocesses.

CliProvider::invoke applies provider_no_public_solution_search_env() to the actual child process environment, not just the helper values. The child also sees A2D_PROVIDER_POLICY_ENV_SOURCE=a2d-cli-provider, so the regression is not satisfied solely by inherited parent no-search variables.

scope_note: This slice propagates no-public-solution-search policy env flags to CLI provider subprocesses for observability. It does not enforce OS/network isolation, does not prove network egress was impossible, and is not official Senior SWE-Bench mastery evidence. The fresh a2d.fitness-evidence.v1 artifact is actual-test source-patch evidence for the crates diff; the env behavior is covered by the focused subprocess regression tests listed above.
